mining.Description:
Cryptocurrency mining is the validation of transactions on the blockchain. Once validated, these transactions are added to the blockchain's public ledger of past transactions.
For this effort, successful miners receive new cryptocurrency as a reward.

burn.Description: Tokens are commonly considered burned after sending to an address whose private keys are impossible (or extremely improbable) for anyone to have access to. Another recommended method is to create a contract which immediately self destructs and sends to its own address.
